message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Politbarometer (West) 1977–1997 (Cumulation)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/DBKSearch/SDESC2.asp?no=2391","justification":"Monthly West German public opinion polls by Forschungsgruppe Wahlen covering government approval, party support, and evaluations of political institutions; includes the late 1970s."},{"title":"Eurobarometer Trend File, 1970–2002","url_or_doi":"https://www.gesis.org/eurobarometer-data-service/data-access/trend-files","justification":"Cumulated Eurobarometer series including West Germany across the 1970s; tracks attitudes toward government, political institutions, parties, and organizations over time."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 7 (1977)","url_or_doi":"https://www.gesis.org/eurobarometer-data-service/data-access/standard-eb","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer wave including West Germany; measures trust in government, political institutions, and party alignments in 1977."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 8 (1977)","url_or_doi":"https://www.gesis.org/eurobarometer-data-service/data-access/standard-eb","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer wave including West Germany; captures views on political system performance and institutions in 1977."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 9 (1978)","url_or_doi":"https://www.gesis.org/eurobarometer-data-service/data-access/standard-eb","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer wave including West Germany; surveys attitudes toward national government, parties, and political organizations in 1978."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 10 (1978)","url_or_doi":"https://www.gesis.org/eurobarometer-data-service/data-access/standard-eb","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer wave including West Germany; includes indicators on trust in government and evaluations of political institutions in 1978."},{"title":"Eurobarometer 11 (1979)","url_or_doi":"https://www.gesis.org/eurobarometer-data-service/data-access/standard-eb","justification":"Standard Eurobarometer wave including West Germany; examines views on government, political system, and parties in 1979."}]}
